{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Dreadgod-controlled sacred artists
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Some [[sacred artists]] are controlled by the [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
